name: commune-fortune
description: A private static slot-style game with Mystery Tokens, authoritative math, Choose Your Ally, mobile-safe effects, and persistent chainable free spins.

scripts.test: node -e "const fs=require('fs');console.log('BEGIN_MYSTERY_TEST_SOURCE');process.stdout.write(fs.readFileSync('tools/mystery-tests.mjs','utf8'));console.log('\nEND_MYSTERY_TEST_SOURCE')" && node tools/feature-tests.mjs && node tools/presentation-tests.mjs && node tools/polish-tests.mjs && node tools/ally-tests.mjs && node tools/mystery-tests.mjs && node tools/ally-mystery-extension-tests.mjs && node tools/qa-tests.mjs && node tools/reel-reaction-tests.mjs && node tools/audio-tests.mjs && node tools/simulate.mjs --check
